title: solanum quadrangulare var. crassifolium
intro: Solanum quadrangulare var. crassifolium, also known as the Four-angled Nightshade or Crassifolium Nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family Solanaceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Solanum quadrangulare var. crassifolium include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to clean wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health conditions.
